## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `npm run format:check`
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm test`

## Risk And Rollback

- [ ] I assessed impact/risk areas
- [ ] I documented rollback steps (if needed)

## Security

- [ ] No secrets/tokens were added
- [ ] Dependency changes are justified and minimal

## Notes

Add screenshots/logs/examples if useful.
